tasks.label: Local-Python-Dependency-Check
args: Write-Host '--- 🐍 Python Outdated Dependencies (Excluding EcoTrace) ---'; try { pip list --outdated | Select-String -NotMatch 'ecotrace' } catch { Write-Warning 'pip is not available.' }; Write-Host '--- 🔒 Python Security Audit ---'; try { safety check } catch { Write-Warning 'safety is not installed. Run: pip install safety' }

tasks.label: Local-JS-Dependency-Check
args: Write-Host '--- 📦 JS Outdated Dependencies ---'; try { npm outdated } catch { Write-Warning 'npm is not available.' }; Write-Host '--- 🛡️ JS Security Audit ---'; try { npm audit } catch { Write-Warning 'npm audit failed.' }
